title: Electrical Engineer (Marine)
description:
Roles & Responsibilities


Responsibilities:

• Performs activities related to the electrical works and maintenance needed onboard vessels

• Systems / power generation / backup power source / fire detection system and safety system for 2 stroke or 4 stroke engines

• Assist to guide onboard service engineers on the task which require electrical engineers’ competencies so as to operate and maintain electrical/electronic/electro-hydraulic/electro-pneumatic/automation systems efficiently.

• Termination works on vessel / Trouble shooting of 4 stroke generator safety system / Electrical governors would be value added

• Advise customers / Supt, the need of shore assistance or need to procure spares in case defects of equipment failures which cannot be resolved thru onboard attendance.

• Carry out on board attendance in liaison with the Service manager

• Provide work done report and submit to service managers

• Experience in carrying out maintenance marine alternators is a plus

• Carry out annual calibration of Cargo tanks Temperature and Pressure sensors, manifold pressure gauges of fleet vessels

• Identify areas for improvements and to have good PR in dealing with customers in SG or Overseas regardless of location



Requirements:

• Diploma in Electrical Engineering / Technical Cert

• Preferably 5 years of relevant work experience in Marine Electrical Industry.

• Hands on experience working onboard sea going vessels as ETO (Electrical-Technical Officers) would be value added

• Possess good knowledge of electrical power distribution, maintenance and practical hands-on skills

• Proficient in troubleshooting & fault diagnosis skills related to electrical, instrumentation, automation & control and including air conditioning and ventilation system

• Able to read and understand Engineering Drawings (Electrical and pneumatic)

• Familiar with regulatory and legislative shipping industry environment • A team player and collaborate well with office technical team as well as shipboard team

• Able to communicate well and Fluency in English in both written and spoken

· Able to travel and working irregular hours as and when the vessel requires services

postedCompany.description:
DIESELMECH ASIA Pte Ltd has a team of passionate and dedicated marine professionas wit more than 15 years of experience in the Marine and Shipping industry. 


Our office and workshop is located at 51C Tuas South Avenue 1, Tuas Industrial Centre, S637262.


Our expertise includes both diesel and gas engines repair works, supervision, troubleshooting and technical consultancy. We also specialize in electronic, pneumatic, safety, automation and control system troubleshooting and overhaul.
postedCompany.name: DIESELMECH ASIA PTE. LTD.
